text: DoubleKernels and platform-array raw accessors are private[gale]; shared public API has zero Array[Double] signatures (grep-verified); raw interop lives only in platform-specific gale/linalg/interop.scala on JVM (fromArrayUnsafe adopting, toArray copying) and JS (Float64Array equivalents); factorizations use single-copy fromDoubleArrayOwned/toDoubleArrayOwnedCopy platform-storage paths instead of the old double-clone round-trip; public toSeq replaces toArray for users. Benchmarks ported to public API/interop. Evidence: testAll 103/103 JVM+JS, benchCompile green, acceptance grep clean.
